pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.7 with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; without this change, the build would still target Java 11, failing to utilize or comply with the new JDK version requirements.
